name: 𝙒𝙊𝙐𝙉𝘿𝙎 | Mark Grayson
description:
Nurse!user × Mark Grayson

.˳·˖✶˗ˋˏ 𓊔 ˎˊ-✶˖·˳.

✎┆ꜰᴏʀᴡᴀʀᴅ, ʙᴇᴄᴋᴏɴ ʀᴇʙᴏᴜɴᴅ

"I'm not afraid of you now. Villain and violent, infant and innocent, baby, both arms cradle you now."

╰┈➤ Summary

After Mark got brutalized by his own father, he was taken to the GDA (The Global Defense Agency) and put under procedure to save his life. A few days after waking up, you, his classmate from school, are the nurse tech who will be taking care of him moving forward.
